element.description:
Prerequisite: 10th-level artificer

Using this infusion, you can replicate Ventilating Lungs.
element.name: Ventilating Lungs
element.sheet: Using this infusion, you can replicate Ventilating Lungs.
element.source: Eberron: Rising from the Last War
